summary: Scaffold and refine new skills with consistent frontmatter and structure.
Extract and process key frames or clips from videos for review and analysis.
Operate repositories, pull requests, issues, and CI flows through GitHub CLI.
Automate browser testing, form filling, screenshots, and structured data extraction.
Summarize CodexBar model-level usage and cost data for Codex or Claude.
Run full browser automation workflows through a Playwright MCP server.
Use essential Docker workflows for container management, image operations, and debugging.
Connect to 100+ third-party APIs with managed OAuth and a single gateway workflow.
Automate Gmail, Calendar, Drive, Docs, and Sheets workflows.
Bridge and orchestrate MCP tools with clearer operator control.
